title: View source for 1950–51 FK Partizan season - Wikipedia
body: You do not have permission to edit this page, for the following reason: This IP address range has been globally blocked . This does not affect your ability to read Wikipedia pages. Most people who see this message have done nothing wrong. Some kinds of blocks restrict editing from specific service providers or telecom companies in response to recent abuse or vandalism, and can sometimes affect other users who are unrelated to that abuse. Review the information below for assistance if you do not believe that you have done anything wrong. This block affects editing on all Wikimedia wikis. The IP address or range 185.17.207.0/24 has been globally blocked by ‪Barras‬ for the following reason(s): Open proxy/Webhost : See the help page if you are affected: This block will expire on 14:07, 24 March 2029. Your current IP address is 185.17.207.116. Even while globally blocked, you will usually still be able to edit pages on Meta-Wiki . If you believe you were blocked by mistake, you can find additional information and instructions in the Stewards Block Wizard . Other useful links: Global blocks · Help:I have been blocked You can view and copy the source of this page: ==Players== ===Squad information=== [[Franjo Šoštarić|Šoštarić]], [[Bruno Belin|Belin]], [[Ratko Čolić|Čolić]], [[Zlatko Čajkovski|Čajkovski]], [[Miodrag Jovanović (footballer, born 1922)|Jovanović]], [[Lajoš Jakovetić|Jakovetić]], Bogojevac, [[Stjepan Bobek|Bobek]], [[Marko Valok|Valok]], [[Aleksandar Atanacković (footballer born 1920)|Atanacković]], [[Antun Herceg|Herceg]], Stojanović, Lazarević, [[Božidar Kolaković|Kolaković]], [[Prvoslav Mihajlović|P. Mihajlović]], [[Branko Zebec|Zebec]], Vorgić, [[Vasilije Šijaković|Šijaković]], [[Božidar Drenovac|Drenovac]], Ančić, Srdzbadija Stanković, Stipić, Tapiška, Torbarov, Stokić, Ruman, Miloš Milutinović, Marjanović, Krajišnik, Branilović, Simonovski.
